message:
🐛 Fix nightly E2E card showing demo data without Demo badge (#978)

On cold start (no cache), the card rendered demo data as if it were real
because isDemoFallback was masked during loading. Now:

- isDemoFallback correctly reflects demo state regardless of loading
- Card shows a skeleton when loading with no real data cached
- Uses useCardLoadingState for consistent skeleton/loading behavior

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -95,7 +95,7 @@ export function useNightlyE2EData() {
   const { guides, isDemo } = cacheResult.data
   return {
     guides,
-    isDemoFallback: isDemo && !cacheResult.isLoading,
+    isDemoFallback: isDemo,
     isLoading: cacheResult.isLoading,
     isRefreshing: cacheResult.isRefreshing,
     isFailed: cacheResult.isFailed,
